name: Boss Chamber
description: Your lair. The final room. Fixed at game start.
flavorText: Every dungeon has a heart. This is yours.

name: Entry Hall
description: REQUIRED — adventurers always enter the dungeon through this room. Only one allowed.
flavorText: Every journey into darkness starts somewhere.

name: Corridor
description: A basic connecting passage. Place between rooms to link them. Cap scales with boss level.
flavorText: Every dungeon starts with a hallway.

name: Barracks
description: Each Barracks adds +5 roster minion slots. Roster minions are the only ones that can patrol, follow, or be assigned. Gateway: without a Barracks, no roster minions. Cap scales with boss level.
flavorText: The bones rest cheap.

name: Guard Post
description: Minions placed here leave to hunt adventurers in any directly door-connected room. They return to the Guard Post after the kill.
flavorText: Four doors. One choice.

name: Crypt
description: Spawns up to 4 Risen Bones (garrison, room-bound). Refills to 4 each Night Phase. Garrison minions cannot leave this room and do not count toward the Barracks cap.
flavorText: They always come back. That's the point.

name: Trap Factory
description: Each Trap Factory adds +5 trap slots to your global trap pool. Gateway: without a Trap Factory, no traps can be placed.
flavorText: Mechanisms. So many mechanisms.

name: Treasury
description: Generates a small Gold stipend at end of Day. Increases adventurer arrival rate. Spawns 4 chests; adventurers can grab them and must escape the dungeon alive to keep the gold (deaths return loot). Chests refill nightly; daily stipend is unaffected by theft.
flavorText: The shinier it gets, the louder it sings.

name: Armory
description: Minions in directly door-connected rooms get +ATK while this Armory is active. Cap scales with boss level.
flavorText: A well-armed skeleton is a happy skeleton.

name: Library of Whispers
description: Reveals next party intel the night before. Tier scales with boss level: L4 size + classes; L6 + personalities; L8 + stats & equipment; L10 + planned route.
flavorText: Every footstep leaves a rumour. Every rumour leaves a page.

name: Watchtower
description: Minions in directly door-connected rooms get a first-strike hit when adventurers enter. Counters Speed Runners and surprise tactics.
flavorText: We see them before they see themselves.

name: Wandering Gate
description: On entry, % chance to teleport adventurer: 60% nearby room, 35% any built room, 5% Boss Chamber.
flavorText: Step in. Step out. Hopefully not the same room.

name: Veil of Forgetting
description: Each Night Phase, erases adventurer intel of all rooms directly door-connected to this one.
flavorText: What was here? Nothing. Nothing was ever here.

name: Catacombs
description: Reactive: when an adventurer dies in this room, a Tier-2 Revenant (garrison, room-bound) rises in their place. Max 2 Revenants alive in the room at once; do not respawn if killed.
flavorText: Old bones don't die. They just wait their turn.

name: Mimic Vault
description: Looks identical to a Treasury on the map. Spawns 2 Mimics (garrison, room-bound) that respawn nightly, plus 1 false chest — if grabbed, it steals gold from the adventurer.
flavorText: It even has the right sparkle.

name: Hall of Trials
description: Spawns a random Tier-2 evolved minion (garrison, room-bound) at Night Phase if none are alive in the room. If killed, does not respawn that night. Cap scales with boss level.
flavorText: Only the proven walk these stones.

name: Wishing Well
description: On entry, coin flip. Heads: adventurer gains +ATK and +HP buff. Tails: adventurer gains 'Marked' (skull icon, takes +50% damage from minions for the rest of the day).
flavorText: Wish carefully. The well listens to one in two.

name: The False Exit
description: Has its own entry door. Adventurers fleeing the dungeon have a chance to flee here instead of the Entry Hall. Trying to leave teleports them to a random built room.
flavorText: They thought they were getting out. They were getting in.

name: Hall of Madness
description: Adventurers in this room have a % chance to attack each other instead of moving on. (Heavy implementation lift — needs new AI state.)
flavorText: He looked at me and I saw the rest of them looking back.

name: Throne Room
description: Spawns 1 Mini-Boss (garrison, room-bound) that scales with boss level (T1 → T2 → T3). No other minions may be placed in this room. Respawns nightly. Cap scales with boss level.
flavorText: Every kingdom has a deputy. Mine has teeth.

name: Sanctum
description: Passive: boss regenerates HP between fights. Aura: minions in directly door-connected rooms also regen.
flavorText: Even the dark needs a quiet place.
